---

description: "Returns the selected directory path. If the user cancels the dialog,"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Open a native OS directory picker dialog."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/dialog/pick-folder"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the selected directory path. If the user cancels the dialog,
`path` will be `null`. Optionally accepts a title and default directory.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./pick-folder.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./pick-folder.StatusCodes.json")}
>
